catalysts: Robotaxi city expansion — new cities, launch dates, regulatory approvals
Unsupervised FSD milestones — new approvals, safety records, states/cities
Cybercab production timeline — production start, ramp numbers, factory readiness
Optimus Gen 3 — reveal date, production start, factory conversion progress
Earnings call dates or forward guidance changes
FSD version releases — wide releases, major capability upgrades
Energy segment — Megapack factory milestones, major deployments

dcf_inputs.watch: Revenue or fare per mile for robotaxi rides
Utilization rate — hours per day or % of time in service
Energy cost per mile or kWh per mile
Insurance cost per vehicle per year
Remote operations staffing ratio (vehicles per operator)
Vehicle useful life expectancy in years
Fleet growth projections — new vehicles per year
WACC or discount rate used in Tesla valuations
Safety metrics — miles per incident, disengagement rate
